allow: Bash(powershell -Command "$lines = Get-Content src/html/onboarding.html; $before = $lines[0..2747]; $after = $lines[2925..\($lines.Length-1\)]; $newContent = $before + '''' + ''      <!-- Step 10: Kickstart your TasteGraph -->'' + $after; $newContent | Set-Content src/html/onboarding.html -Encoding UTF8; Write-Host ''Done. Total lines:'' $newContent.Length")
